subject: FW:
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Boardman, Serena
[mailto:Serena.Boardman@SothebysInternationalRealty.com] 
Sent: Friday, April 11, 2008 8:03 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: 



Dear Lesley:

Please let Mr. Epstein know that I have listed 22 East 71st Street for
$75million.

The house is a 45ft wide limestone mansion on Mr. Epstein's block and I
thought that he might be interested to know about this properties
availability.

If he would like to see the house, I would of course be delighted to
show it.

Thanks for passing along this information and please also send my best
wishes to Mr. Epstein.

Regards,
Serena Boardman

Serena Boardman
Senior Vice President
Sotheby's International Realty
38 East 61st Street
New York, New York 10021
212-606-7611 - Office
212-606-7661 - Fax
917-667-2468 - Mobile
serena.boardman@sothebysrealty.com
